authorities.title: Reorganization provisions
authorities.excerpt: Qualification turns on statutory form, continuity, business purpose, and related requirements.

authorities.title: Continuity regulations
authorities.excerpt: The regulations address continuity of business enterprise, continuity of interest, and plan requirements.

authorities.title: Limitation on net operating loss carryforwards
authorities.excerpt: Ownership changes can materially limit the use of pre-change losses and other attributes.

authorities.title: Applicable asset acquisition allocation rules
authorities.excerpt: Purchase price allocation rules affect basis and future tax attributes in applicable asset acquisitions.

authorities.title: Certain stock purchases treated as asset acquisitions
authorities.excerpt: Section 338 provides election mechanics for certain qualified stock purchases.

authorities.title: Classification of LLC acquisition transactions
authorities.excerpt: Guidance addresses income tax treatment of sales involving single-member LLC interests and underlying assets.

authorities.title: Nonrecognition on contributions to partnerships
authorities.excerpt: Section 721 governs nonrecognition on certain contributions to partnerships.

authorities.title: Disguised sale regulations
authorities.excerpt: The disguised sale rules address transfers of property to partnerships and related distributions.

authorities.title: Material difference realization standard
authorities.citation: Cottage Savings Ass'n v. Commissioner, 499 U.S. 554 (1991)
authorities.excerpt: The case addresses realization concepts that can inform exchange and restructuring analysis.

authorities.title: Asset acquisition statement instructions
authorities.excerpt: The form instructions reflect reporting expectations for applicable asset acquisitions and allocations.

authorities.title: Internal precedent on rollover equity governance sensitivity
authorities.excerpt: Prior deal work suggests rollover governance terms can alter continuity and value-allocation conclusions.

authorities.title: State transfer tax checklist
authorities.excerpt: Internal precedent flags transfer taxes and bulk sale rules as recurring diligence items in asset-heavy deals.

authorities.title: Corporate interest limitation guidance
authorities.excerpt: The notice provides preliminary guidance related to the business interest limitation rules.

authorities.title: Withholding certificate instructions
authorities.excerpt: The instructions support payee classification and documentation for withholding purposes.
